hints.text: Short plates, usually white w/ a **turquoise strip on top**; front plates not required
**White pickup, usually fully blurred** (antenna occasionally visible; Costa Rica's truck is unblurred, Ecuador's has no antenna/railing)
Tropical w/ **lots of hills**, palms + drier rolling fields
Roads often paralleled by **fences made partly of small living trees** (rest of the posts wooden)
Spanish-colonial architecture: vibrant colours, red metal/tile roofs, barred windows
Road lines: usually solid outer white + inner yellow; **solid outer white w/ NO middle line ≈ unique to Panama** in LatAm
Poles mostly round concrete (varying insulators), often w/ plates + blue/white/red painted numbers
**Yellow taxis w/ a chequerboard stripe** (plate drawn on the side w/ city name + regional code)
Stop sign **"ALTO"** (thicker font than MX/CR/GT); **red octagonal sign w/ an oddly realistic eye** = unique to Panama
Coverage sparse on the north coast + east of Panama City; **phone & taxi-plate first digit = region**; David flat, Changuinola bananas, Panama City white high-rises
